title: tephroseris papposa var. aurata
intro: Tephroseris papposa var. aurata, commonly known as the golden auriculata, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris papposa var. aurata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
